roles.groupTrainingDesc: Control who can create and manage training sessions (coaches/staff) and who can view and provide feedback (athletes).
roles.groupTicketsDesc: Control ticket lifecycle: view, create, edit, assign, comment, and close.
roles.groupNotificationsDesc: Control push and email notification campaigns, templates, and send permissions.
roles.groupAdministrationDesc: Control access to user management and RBAC configuration.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.emptyHint: Create the first one using the form above.
budgets.cancelledNotice: There {count, plural, one {is # cancelled budget} other {are # cancelled budgets}}. You can delete them permanently using the 🗑 button.
budgets.cancelConfirm: Cancel budget "{name}"? The status will change to Cancelled.
budgets.deleteConfirm:
Permanently delete "{name}"?

All items and articles will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.

detail.cancelBudgetConfirm: Cancel this budget? This action changes the status to "Cancelled".
detail.deleteBudgetConfirm:
Permanently delete "{name}"?

This action will also delete all items and articles. Cannot be undone.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.deleteConfirm: Delete expense "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
expenses.partialEditWarning: ⚠️ This expense is in {status} status. Only title, invoice, description and notes can be edited.

form.sendForReviewLabel: Send to approval authority when saving
form.sendForReviewHint: The expense will be in Under Review status immediately. The approver can approve or reject it.
form.createdAndSent: Expense created and sent to approval authority.
form.createdPartialError: Expense created. Could not send for review: {error}

payments.title: Payments
payments.approvedPending: {count, plural, one {# approved expense} other {# approved expenses}} pending payment
payments.readyToPay: {count, plural, one {There is # approved expense} other {There are # approved expenses}} ready to pay.
payments.noApprovedExpenses: No expenses with Approved status available. Expenses must be approved before a payment can be registered.
payments.deletePaymentConfirm: Delete this payment? Attached receipts will also be deleted.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.count: {count, plural, one {# active supplier} other {# active suppliers}}
suppliers.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate supplier "{name}"? It will no longer appear in new expenses.
suppliers.deleteConfirm:
Permanently delete "{name}"?

All attached documents will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

form.disciplineHint: Indicate the main discipline or area this supplier serves.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.description: Record staff and technical team earnings. Each entry generates a linked expense in the {category} category that follows the approval flow and affects the budget.
payroll.pendingBanner: {count, plural, one {# payroll} other {# payrolls}} pending authorization
payroll.deleteConfirm: Delete payroll for {name}? This action will also delete the linked expense.

form.noStaff: No staff profiles with staff roles registered.
form.grossAmountHint: Record only. Deduction calculations are done externally.
form.sendForAuthHint: The payroll expense will be in Under Review status and will appear in the expenses to pay list.
form.createdAndSent: Payroll created and sent for review.

payroll.flowStep1: Create payroll here → a {draft} is automatically generated under the "{category}" category
payroll.flowStep2: Send to authorization → expense goes to {underReview} and appears in "Expenses to pay"
payroll.flowStep3: The approver approves from the Expenses section → moves to {approved} (affects exercised budget)
payroll.flowStep4: When payment is registered in the Payments section → moves to {paid} (appears in P&L as Payroll)

privacyConsent.title: Privacy Notice
privacyConsent.subtitle: Before continuing, you need to accept our privacy notice.
privacyConsent.intro: This platform is exclusively for athletes registered by the administrative team. By accessing it, you agree that your personal and sports data will be processed in accordance with our policy:
privacyConsent.bullet1: Identification data: name, email address and phone number.
privacyConsent.bullet2: Sports, medical, nutritional and psychological information.
privacyConsent.bullet3: Only authorized staff have access to your information.
privacyConsent.bullet4: Your data is never sold or shared with commercial third parties.
privacyConsent.closedGroup: Access to this platform is by administrator invitation only. If you have questions about how your data is used, contact privacidad@aodeporte.com.
privacyConsent.checkboxLabel: I have read and accept the
privacyConsent.footer: You must accept to access the platform. This notice complies with applicable privacy law.
